response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and any demonstrated domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking — instead showcasing extensive work in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no financial systems exposure.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in CI/CD, testing, and developer tooling
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Zero domain experience in fixed income, capital markets, or banking systems
SQL experience listed but no context of use in financial or high-performance trading systems
